diagnoses.name: Femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) / acetabular labral tear
diagnoses.source: Magee Orthopedic Physical Assessment; Reiman et al. FADIR/FABER diagnostic accuracy meta-analysis

diagnoses.name: Hip osteoarthritis
diagnoses.source: Magee; Altman clinical criteria for hip OA; capsular pattern (Cyriax)
keyExams: Passive hip ROM with end-feel (capsular pattern)

diagnoses.name: Greater trochanteric pain syndrome (gluteal tendinopathy)
diagnoses.source: Magee; Grimaldi & Fearon GTPS clinical diagnosis criteria

diagnoses.name: Proximal hamstring tendinopathy
diagnoses.source: Magee; Cook & Purdam tendinopathy continuum model

diagnoses.name: Adductor-related groin pain (adductor strain / athletic pubalgia)
diagnoses.source: Magee; Doha agreement meeting classification of groin pain in athletes
keyExams: Palpation of adductor origin / pubic ramus

diagnoses.name: Piriformis syndrome / deep gluteal syndrome
diagnoses.source: Magee; Martin et al. deep gluteal syndrome diagnostic criteria

diagnoses.name: Snapping hip syndrome (coxa saltans, internal or external)
diagnoses.source: Magee; Musick et al. snapping hip syndrome review
keyExams: Dynamic snapping hip test (observe/palpate active flexion-extension)
